notes: Worked on added fixes for the social media icon images not showing for the footer component: https://github.com/webriq/stackshift-ui/commit/e911c190b77ad9041bebb53e702473ec9910ca56. The issue wasn't just from the package, a fix to the query file was needed as well: https://github.com/webriq-pagebuilder/site-template-default/pull/284/commits/3ac2f81700aa2fbf9762987f5be4b852f6217015
log_notes: Worked on added fixes for the social media icon images not showing for the footer component: https://github.com/webriq/stackshift-ui/commit/e911c190b77ad9041bebb53e702473ec9910ca56. The issue wasn't just from the package, a fix to the query file was needed as well: https://github.com/webriq-pagebuilder/site-template-default/pull/284/commits/3ac2f81700aa2fbf9762987f5be4b852f6217015

notes:
Investigated cause of issue and found that the social media icon for footer fields when "other" option is selected doesn't return the correct image string. We had previously added the fallback value of the WebriQ when no image is returned to filter <img /> element error when string is empty. Published a new version of the package with the fixes here: 
https://github.com/webriq-pagebuilder/site-template-default/pull/284/commits/41a15f37a924358c2e6f5e2bf7f39846607b4306 but when I checked it on the preview StackShift default from my test page /mariel-page the issue still persists. Re-checking.
log_notes:
Investigated cause of issue and found that the social media icon for footer fields when "other" option is selected doesn't return the correct image string. We had previously added the fallback value of the WebriQ when no image is returned to filter <img /> element error when string is empty. Published a new version of the package with the fixes here: 
https://github.com/webriq-pagebuilder/site-template-default/pull/284/commits/41a15f37a924358c2e6f5e2bf7f39846607b4306 but when I checked it on the preview StackShift default from my test page /mariel-page the issue still persists. Re-checking.

module_detail.name: Quattro Key LIVE site not reflecting changes

notes: Upon checking, auto-publishing was locked for this project's deploy in Netlify. This is the reason why the latest builds were not published to the live site (the last published deploy was from September 2024). The latest build was published and also had the the auto-publishing enabled for the project so future builds will automatically get published. Confirmed with April Grace Trocio that this is now resolved and changes are present on the live site: https://quattrokeyrealty.com/
log_notes: Upon checking, auto-publishing was locked for this project's deploy in Netlify. This is the reason why the latest builds were not published to the live site (the last published deploy was from September 2024). The latest build was published and also had the the auto-publishing enabled for the project so future builds will automatically get published. Confirmed with April Grace Trocio that this is now resolved and changes are present on the live site: https://quattrokeyrealty.com/

notes:
1. Merged PR from yesterday's updates to main branch.
2. Update supabase conversation to save user info so that AI won't have to ask for question even if the user already gave its credentials.
3. Update OpenAI tools in extracting user info and for the sending email detection.
4. Removed reason and priority in the email template.
5. Added cc_email both in project settings and in chat api configuration so that, sending email would be dynamic.
6. Modifying the create project api to include empty array for the default of CC email.
7. Contact sharing tool updates to trigger sending email based on user query.
8. Updated system prompt of the module chat to not always ask user credentials if its already provided and it should tell user which email it was sent to the team for verification.

Github: https://github.com/webriq/module-aichat
branch: main
log_notes:
1. Merged PR from yesterday's updates to main branch.
2. Update supabase conversation to save user info so that AI won't have to ask for question even if the user already gave its credentials.
3. Update OpenAI tools in extracting user info and for the sending email detection.
4. Removed reason and priority in the email template.
5. Added cc_email both in project settings and in chat api configuration so that, sending email would be dynamic.
